title: Emily
html:
Yahir's partner through late-2025 → 2026 (Austin era). The relationship anchors the post-Sam attempt at attachment.

Key facts

  • First named in 2025 09 25 the manner that emily trails her words is eerily similar to — Yahir notes her "trailing of words" is eerily like Sam's.
  • Gift-attention sustained Sept 2025 → Feb 2026 (2025 09 15 gifts for people): Camel Turkish Royals, scent box, Danish apron, protein powder, wired headphones.
  • Shared activity with Yahir: a co-authored watchlist (2025 12 14 our watchlist anything goes) modified through March 2026 — "(never seen it) (same!!!)" markers prove dual authorship.
  • Misalignment audit documented in 2026 03 24 alignment misalignment: marriage seen as restriction, no long-term planning, doesn't support Yahir's spiritual journey, "can appreciate my confidence but not the mission necessarily."
  • The whole arc echoes the post-Sam criterion Yahir set in 2024 05 08 biggest lesson — "see your unborn children in her eyes."

Open questions

  • Last name?
  • Where they met (Austin, online, mutual friend)?
  • Does the relationship survive past March 2026?
